testcase.name: Regression Pack › PDH-T745 Verify report name uniqueness
testcase.system-out: 🔐 Loading credentials for STG environment ✓ Logging in with user: Isb***@accenture.com ✓ Cookies modal closed ✓ Terms and service accepted ✓ Attempted to create report with name: SingleEDP_Other ✓ Verified: Duplicate report name error displayed - "This report name is already in use within your organization. Please enter a new name." ℹ Duplicate report name confirmed; exiting this test flow from createReportUniqueness. ✓ Verified: Report name "SingleEDP_Other" is identified as duplicate.
